title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Presets Without Stripe: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan trying to sell presets, but Stripe restricts you. PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip are no help either. Your digital products remain unsold due to payment processing obstacles. It's time for a better solution – an infrastructure that doesn't exclude you. In this post, we'll explore the limitations of conventional platforms and introduce an alternative that works globally, without restrictions.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular choices for selling digital products, but they come with geographical limitations. PayPal restricts access in numerous countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe also has a list of banned countries, which often includes countries in Africa and the Middle East. Gumroad and Payhip have similar restrictions, making it difficult for creators from restricted countries to sell their digital products. In contrast, Unchained Commerce provides an infrastructure that works worldwide, without the need for payment processors that restrict access.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When you're blocked by a payment processor, your sales come to a halt. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip don't offer a clear solution for creators in restricted countries. Instead, they force you to find alternative payment methods, which can be time-consuming and unreliable. Unchained Commerce takes a different approach. With NOWPayments as our payment processor, we support over 300 coins and don't require KYC or buyer accounts. This means you can sell your digital products without worrying about geographical restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When you sell digital products, you want fast, secure, and affordable payment processing. But conventional platforms often come with hidden fees, slow payment processing, and unreliable support. Unchained Commerce offers a faster and more cost-effective solution. With our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), you can integrate a frontend wallet that generates multi-chain QR codes and provides live price feeds. This way, buyers can pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, and you receive your payment instantly.
Conventional platforms like PayPal and Stripe restrict access to creators in numerous countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key to a successful digital product business. You want to focus on creating, not manually processing sales and deliveries. Unchained Commerce provides an automated delivery system that works seamlessly with our infrastructure. With our Core Shop Engine ($49.99), you can set up automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. This means you can sell your digital products without lifting a finger, and your buyers receive their products instantly.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a creator in a restricted country, Unchained Commerce is the obvious choice. Our infrastructure works worldwide, without geographical limitations. With NOWPayments as our payment processor, you can sell your digital products in over 300 coins, without KYC or buyer accounts. Our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and Core Shop Engine ($49.99) provide automation and delivery capabilities that save you time and effort. Take the first step towards selling your digital products without restrictions – visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's infrastructure works globally, without geographical limitations, and supports over 300 coins.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're struggling to find a PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries, look no further than Unchained Commerce. Our infrastructure, combined with NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), provides a seamless and automated solution for selling digital products worldwide.
